Classes

We offer classes for all skill levels, from beginners to future professionals.

1-on-1 Master Class

  • CAD 1,500
  • On-demand Mentorship
  • Future Professionals

Who should take this class

A future professional that needs a customized learning experience to excel in their chosen areas, at their own pace.

Curriculum

  • Personal Consultation
  • Customized Makeup Theory
  • Hands-On Practical Application
  • Specialized Topics (based on participant's interests)
  • Business and Career Guidance
  • Conclusion and Future Support
View Class

Professional 1-Day Makeup Workshop

  • CAD 800
  • 8 hours
  • Emerging Professionals

Who should take this class

A makeup enthusiast who wants to discover popular and practical techniques to apply right away!

Curriculum

  • Introduction to Makeup Artistry
  • Essential Tools and Products
  • Foundation and Base Techniques
  • Eye Makeup Techniques
  • Contouring, Highlighting, and Blush
  • Lip Makeup
  • Hands-On Practice with Feedback
  • Business and Professionalism
  • Conclusion and Certificate
View Class

Self-Makeup Beginner Class

  • CAD 80
  • 3-4 hours
  • Beginner and Enthusiast

Who should take this class

A makeup enthusiast that wants to learn the basics, practice doing their own makeup and make new friends in the process!

Curriculum

  • Introduction to Makeup Artistry
  • Essential Tools and Products
  • Skin prep and Applying Foundation
  • Enhancing eyes, brows, and lashes
  • Blush and Contouring
  • Perfecting Lips
  • Hands-On Practice with Feedback
  • Tips for Everyday Makeup
  • Conclusion and Q&A Session
View Class
